_doc: Curated, MD-approved watch list for the DETERMINISTIC Change Sentinel (scripts/change-sentinel.py). NO LLM is involved in detection — every flag is a fact from NCBI / ClinicalTrials.gov / openFDA with a link to the exact record. The agent NEVER edits a protocol; it points, the MD reads the primary source, then Approve/Reject. Unverifiable this run => 'unverified', never a fabricated change.

_rules.retraction_watch: EVERY cited PMID across all published protocols is checked for a PubMed 'Retracted Publication' record. Source of truth: NCBI esummary pubtype. No config needed.
_rules.trial_status_watch: EVERY cited NCT is checked; flags only if overallStatus is TERMINATED / WITHDRAWN / SUSPENDED. Source of truth: ClinicalTrials.gov v2 statusModule.overallStatus.
_rules.fda_label_watch: ONLY the agents explicitly listed below (agent -> openFDA brand_name) are watched. Flags only when the label's effective_time is NEWER than the recorded baseline. No fuzzy name matching — unlisted agents are not label-watched (peptides without an FDA label rely on retraction + trial-status only).
_rules.fail_closed: A source that cannot be reached is reported 'unverified' and is NOT treated as a change.
